validation_check: Model uses processed analysis-ready dataset generated by cleaning script
Target is default_payment_next_month from historical dataset
Risk decile lift confirms whether model ranks borrower risk effectively
Probability bands compare predicted default probability with observed default rate
Operating threshold evaluated using approval rate, default capture, and risk-adjusted profitability proxy
Model performance reviewed across utilization, repayment, balance, payment, age, and credit-limit segments
Demographic fields reviewed only for monitoring, not direct decision rules
Analysis is documented as a portfolio analytics demonstration rather than a production underwriting system
